mapper.select: SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SSPS_TYP_CD, SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD, RPR_PRGRS_CCD, DL_P_RNMCNO, RSK_MRK, RSK_GRD_CD, OK_CCD, INST_ID, SCNR_MRK, AI_RESULT, FIU_RPT_NO, FIU_RPT_DT, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM NIC66B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{sspsDlCrtDt} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{sspsDlId} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR'

SELECT P.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, P.DL_P_RNMCNO, P.DL_P_NM, P.DL_P_RNM_NO_CCD, P.INDV_CORP_CCD, D.DL_P_BRTDY, D.DL_P_SEX_CD, D.OCPTN_CCD, D.DL_P_HSE_ADDR, D.DL_P_MBL_TEL_NO, D.WP_NM, D.RNM_CMBNTN_NO FROM NIC70B P LEFT JOIN NIC78B D ON D.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = P.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND D.DL_P_RNMCNO = P.DL_P_RNMCNO WHERE P.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{sspsDlCrtDt} AND P.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{dlPRnmcno}

SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, SEQ_NO, MN_DL_BRN_CD, MN_DL_BRN_NM, DL_DT, DL_TM, DL_AMT, DL_TYP_CCD, DL_CCY, CNTRP_AC_NO, CNTRP_NM, CNTRP_BNK_CD, CHNL_CCD FROM NIC73B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{sspsDlCrtDt} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{sspsDlId} ORDER BY SEQ_NO

SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID, RPR_RSN_CNTNT, ITEM_CNTNT1, ITEM_CNTNT2, ITEM_CNTNT3, ITEM_CNTNT4, ITEM_CNTNT5, ITEM_CNTNT6, DOBT_DL_GRD_CD, REG_ID, REG_DT, UPD_ID, UPD_DT FROM NIC67B WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{sspsDlCrtDt} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{sspsDlId}
mapper.update: UPDATE NIC66B SET RPR_PRGRS_CCD = #{rprPrgrsCcd}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{sspsDlCrtDt} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{sspsDlId} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR'

UPDATE NIC66B SET RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '10', FIU_RPT_NO = #{fiuRptNo}, FIU_RPT_DT = #{fiuRptDt}, UPD_ID = #{updId}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = #{sspsDlCrtDt} AND SSPS_DL_ID = #{sspsDlId} AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC66B WHERE FIU_RPT_NO LIKE CONCAT('FIU', #{dateStr}, '%')
